{{Quote|Clearing for action, ma'am.|Mr. Halley|<ref name="The DarkStryder Campaign">{{DarkStryder|adventure=Traitor in our Midst|book=The DarkStryder Campaign}}</ref>}}
Mr. '''Halley''' was a member of the crew of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]''. He served in the cee-cee as officer of the watch during the [[Battle of Galtea]].

{{Char-stub}}
